age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 37 years as on 15 June 2026. Age relaxation will be applicable as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: First Class Graduation in Psychology or any branch of Psychology; First Class Masters in Psychology or any branch of Psychology; Ph.D Psychology or any branch of Psychology
qualification.details: First Class Graduation in Psychology or any branch of Psychology. First Class Masters in Psychology or any branch of Psychology. Ph.D Psychology or any branch of Psychology.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Delhi to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Delhi Project Research Scientist-I Non-medical recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the AIIMS Delhi Project Research Scientist-I Non-medical position is 30th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Project Research Scientist-I Non-medical post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Research Scientist-I Non-medical post at AIIMS Delhi as per the advertisement N-2672.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for this post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualifications include a First Class Graduation, First Class Masters, and a Ph.D. in Psychology or any branch of Psychology.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to this position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Research Scientist-I Non-medical post is 37 years as of 15th June 2026. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Project Research Scientist-I Non-medical role?
faq.answer: The selection process for this position will involve shortlisting of candidates followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the AIIMS Delhi Project Research Scientist-I Non-medical recruitment is strictly online.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Project Research Scientist-I Non-medical position is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section provided in this article. It is recommended to read it thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q10. What is the salary offered for the Project Research Scientist-I Non-medical post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Project Research Scientist-I Non-medical post will be as per the funding agency's guidelines. Specific details are usually provided in the official notification.
